compute_instance_template.html.markdown.old: this blank, Terraform will auto-generate a unique name.

container_engine_versions.html.markdown.old: * `version_prefix` (Optional) - If provided, Terraform will only return versions
container_engine_versions.html.markdown.new: * `version_prefix` (Optional) - If provided, the provider will only return versions

dns_managed_zone.html.markdown.old: * `dns_name` - The fully qualified DNS name of this zone, e.g. `terraform.io.`.
dns_managed_zone.html.markdown.new: * `dns_name` - The fully qualified DNS name of this zone, e.g. `example.io.`.

service_account_id_token.html.markdown.old: The following configuration will invoke [Cloud Run](https://cloud.google.com/run/docs/authenticating/service-to-service) endpoint where the service account for Terraform has been granted `roles/run.invoker` role previously.
service_account_id_token.html.markdown.new: The following configuration will invoke [Cloud Run](https://cloud.google.com/run/docs/authenticating/service-to-service) endpoint where the service account for the provider has been granted `roles/run.invoker` role previously.

storage_project_service_account.html.mar.old: Terraform apply errors in cases where the service account does not yet exist.
storage_project_service_account.html.mar.new: provider update errors in cases where the service account does not yet exist.

storage_project_service_account.html.mar.old: pulumi up errors in cases where the service account does not yet exist.
storage_project_service_account.html.mar.new: provider update errors in cases where the service account does not yet exist.

storage_project_service_account.html.mar.old: >  When you write Terraform code which uses features depending on this service account *and* your Terraform code adds the service account in IAM policy on other resources,
storage_project_service_account.html.mar.new: >  When you write provider code which uses features depending on this service account *and* your provider code adds the service account in IAM policy on other resources,
